ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that was ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Clothing, Footwear) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the order status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being tracked */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold level for reordering the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for platform access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being tracked */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the order */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* User who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code for the customer */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the discount expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refunds" (
  "refund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related order */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date when the refund was issued */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refunds_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
